evals.prompt: List all windows in cmux and show me which one is currently focused
evals.expected_output: Should execute 'cmux list-windows' and 'cmux current-window' commands

evals.prompt: Create a new terminal split on the right side of the current workspace and run 'htop' in it
evals.expected_output: Should execute 'cmux new-split right' followed by 'cmux send --surface <id> htop' with Enter key

evals.prompt: Open https://example.com in a new browser split in cmux
evals.expected_output: Should execute 'cmux new-surface --type browser --url https://example.com' or 'cmux browser open-split https://example.com'

evals.prompt: Send the text 'ls -la' to surface abc123 and press Enter
evals.expected_output: Should execute 'cmux send --surface abc123 ls -la' and 'cmux send-key --surface abc123 Enter'

evals.prompt: Show me the tree structure of all workspaces in cmux
Navigate the browser in cmux to https://github.com and search for 'odoo'
evals.expected_output: Should execute browser commands: 'cmux browser goto https://github.com' then type and press enter

evals.prompt: Close the workspace with index 2 in cmux

evals.expected_output: Should execute 'cmux rename-workspace Development' (using current workspace)
